meaning: n.[解]鹰嘴(指肘部的骨性隆起)
examples: Clinical Relevance the olecranon is a key osseous constraint of the elbow.
Olecranon fractures are usually isolated injuries but they can also be found in polytrauma patients.
Conclusion olecranon hook plate, the same as tension band wire, is a reliable and rational way for olecranon fracture.
